explanation: This command simulates a benign use of MSPUB.EXE to download a file via HTTP. It uses a standard URL format and minimal arguments to avoid triggering the Sigma rule.
This command uses the long-form option '--url' instead of '-url' and HTTPS instead of HTTP. It remains functionally equivalent but uses a different syntax to test detection robustness.
This command uses the FTP protocol instead of HTTP/HTTPS. It is functionally equivalent and tests whether the Sigma rule detects all URL-based triggers.
This command uses a backslash in the URL path, which is a safe mutation technique to test parsing behavior and detection robustness.
This command adds an explicit port number to the URL. It is a safe mutation that tests whether the Sigma rule accounts for such variations.
